summary: Reviewed CORE-203 closeout carrier after implementation PR #217 merged.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: CORE-203 implementation merged, all covered issues have post-merge evidence, and the closeout carrier records the merged state without changing Core runtime behavior.

carrier_only_closeout_review.reason: This closeout PR only records post-merge CORE-203 facts and does not modify runtime behavior.
